title: Physics Basics
description: Explore velocity, acceleration, forces, Euler integration, and simple sphere collision resolution.
learningObjectives: Use Euler integration to update positions over time

sections.title: Euler Integration and Particle Movement
sections.content: Physics engines simulate movements by integrating derivatives over time increments (dt). Euler Integration is the simplest method: we update velocity based on acceleration, and then position based on velocity. While simple and fast, Euler integration can drift in high-speed or varying frame rate scenarios, making semi-implicit Euler or Verlet integration preferred for complex game systems.

sections.title: Euler Integration and Sphere Collisions
